title: Nervilia commersonii
taxonomy: Nervilia commersonii is classified as a species within the genus Nervilia, which belongs to the subfamily Vandeae, and is part of the family Orchidaceae. This classification places Nervilia commersonii as an orchid, a diverse group of flowering plants. The genus Nervilia, which includes Nervilia commersonii, is characterized by its unique leaf shape and habitat preferences. The subfamily Vandeae is one of the largest and most diverse subfamilies within the Orchidaceae family. Nervilia commersonii's classification highlights the intricate relationships between different plant species within the orchid family.
